'''Idow''', along with [[Gottu]], was the [[Urban Guerrillas/Legends|urban combat specialist]] of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Judder Page/Legends|Judder Page's]] special forces commando team called the [[Katarn Commandos]]. They were known for their capture of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] outpost near the city of [[Bruzion]] on [[Jendorn]] using only a [[Vibro-ax/Legends|vibro-ax]] and two [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]].

{{Char-stub}}
